'''padolo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cyberanarchist|cyberanarchist]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-d-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cyberanarchist|cyberanarchist]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| padolo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:pædeleth|pædeleth]] || [[word:pædelej|pædelej]] || [[word:pædelesh|pædelesh]] || [[word:pædele|pædele]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:padodoloth|padodoloth]] || [[word:padodoloj|padodoloj]] || [[word:padodolosh|padodolosh]] || [[word:padodolo|padodolo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:padoloth|padoloth]] || [[word:padoloj|padoloj]] || [[word:padolosh|padolosh]] || [[word:padolo|padolo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:padofloth|padofloth]] || [[word:padofloj|padofloj]] || [[word:padoflosh|padoflosh]] || [[word:padoflof|padoflof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:padolotho|padolotho]] || [[word:padolojo|padolojo]] || [[word:padolosho|padolosho]] || [[word:padoloko|padoloko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:padoloth|padoloth]] || [[word:padoloj|padoloj]] || [[word:padolosh|padolosh]] || [[word:padolo|padolo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:padolothol|padolothol]] || [[word:padolojol|padolojol]] || [[word:padoloshol|padoloshol]] || [[word:padolokol|padolokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:padolothotho|padolothotho]] || [[word:padolojojo|padolojojo]] || [[word:padoloshosho|padoloshosho]] || [[word:padoloko|padoloko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:padolothon|padolothon]] || [[word:padolojon|padolojon]] || [[word:padoloshon|padoloshon]] || [[word:padolokon|padolokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:padolothoro|padolothoro]] || [[word:padolojoro|padolojoro]] || [[word:padoloshoro|padoloshoro]] || [[word:padolokoro|padolokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
